phases.description: Implement from VerifyWise: AI system inventory + one-click board export for Copilot programs
Implement from FairNow: Automated evidence collection for board packs
Implement from Credo AI: Board-ready audit pack pattern for NW1 Copilot wedge
Implement from Giskard: Pre-prod Copilot/agent regression tests
Implement from Promptfoo: Microsoft Copilot plugin eval gate in CI
Implement from Holistic AI: Copilot use-case risk register
Implement from Monitaur: Approval workflow per AI system
Implement from Arthur AI: Drift alerts on Copilot outputs
Implement from Fiddler AI: Explainability on high-risk Copilot answers
Implement from Lakera: Block/allow log per prompt at dispatch
Implement from Lasso Security: Shadow Copilot discovery for NW1
Implement from Cranium: Third-party AI inventory
Implement from HiddenLayer: Threat detection on AI apps
Implement from Enkrypt AI: Policy enforcement log per call
Implement from ModelOp: Enterprise AI registry pattern
Implement from Langfuse: Per-action audit trail for Copilot runs
Implement from Braintrust: Board metric: pass rate trend over time
Implement from Collibra: Data lineage on AI outputs (pattern)
Implement from OneTrust: DPIA + AI use register (pattern)
Implement from IBM watsonx.governance: Executive dashboard pattern only — not primary comparable
